precondition: Fresh app settings or an older settings file without overlay_enabled
expected_behavior: Settings shows Overlay / 游戏悬浮层 with value 关闭, and no overlay window is visible.

precondition: Desktop app is running and backend settings are loaded
expected_behavior: Switching Overlay to 开启 creates a transparent frameless always-on-top window near the right middle-lower area without stealing focus.

precondition: Overlay is enabled and there is no recent safe assistant or proactive message
expected_behavior: Overlay shows a restrained idle placeholder such as Rei 正安静待机。 without showing debug content.

precondition: Overlay is enabled and an assistant reply has completed
expected_behavior: Overlay shows only a 1-3 message Rei bubble list using truncated safe summaries, with the latest assistant summary visible.

precondition: Overlay is enabled and proactive companion emits a safe short message
expected_behavior: Overlay may show the proactive safe short message as a Rei bubble without affecting the main chat flow.

precondition: Overlay is currently enabled and visible
expected_behavior: Switching Overlay to 关闭 hides the overlay window and does not change main chat messages.

precondition: Overlay setting has been changed and the app is restarted
expected_behavior: Overlay enabled state is restored from app settings after restart; default remains off for fresh settings.

precondition: Overlay has been enabled, updated, and disabled at least once
expected_behavior: Event Stream shows overlay lifecycle summaries, message counts, and character counts only.

precondition: Desktop app is opened in dev or packaged smoke mode
expected_behavior: Main window is not black, Settings contains Overlay, enabling it opens a separate overlay window, and disabling it hides the window.
